name: Babciuc Olga
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Master stylist with over 20 years of experience.
He is a certified master stylist of the 1st category of the KCCC of Vyacheslav Dyudenko. Her works have been repeatedly published in the Mirror magazine. She performs all types of colouring and haircuts, creates hairstyles (except for certain types), and also deals with hair extensions. A professional with an individual approach who helps clients find the perfect style, taking into account their features and wishes.
commentsPlainText: Master stylist with over 20 years of experience.He is a certified master stylist of the 1st category of the KCCC of Vyacheslav Dyudenko. Her works have been repeatedly published in the Mirror magazine. She performs all types of colouring and haircuts, creates hairstyles (except for certain types), and also deals with hair extensions. A professional with an individual approach who helps clients find the perfect style, taking into account their features and wishes.

name: Diachuk Viki
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Master of manicure, pedicure, and podiatry with over 8 years of experience.
She performs classic, combined, and European manicure, gel polish, nail strengthening, and prosthetics. She specialises in podiatry pedicure, treatment of onychomycosis, removal of calluses and corns, and installation of a correction system (titanium thread).
commentsPlainText: Master of manicure, pedicure, and podiatry with over 8 years of experience.She performs classic, combined, and European manicure, gel polish, nail strengthening, and prosthetics. She specialises in podiatry pedicure, treatment of onychomycosis, removal of calluses and corns, and installation of a correction system (titanium thread).

name: Dilai Anastasiia
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Manicure and pedicure master with over 8 years of experience.
She performs classic, combined, and hardware manicure, gel polish with levelling, extensions on the lower forms, creates designs in geometry, minimalism, and classic French techniques. She is proficient in the technique of dry (hardware) pedicure. Pays special attention to the shape of the nails, creating a perfect square, complemented by a flawless French or stylish minimalist design.

She is proficient in the technique of dry (hardware) pedicure. Pays special attention to the shape of the nails, creating a perfect square, complemented by a flawless French or stylish minimalist design.

name: Dosca Aliona
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Manicure and pedicure master with over 3 years of experience.
Performs combined and hardware manicure and pedicure, nail extension, and various types of design. Pays special attention to the shape of the nails, creating a perfect square. Her superpower is a clear French cut, minimalist designs, and impeccable aesthetics of each work.
commentsPlainText: Manicure and pedicure master with over 3 years of experience.Performs combined and hardware manicure and pedicure, nail extension, and various types of design. Pays special attention to the shape of the nails, creating a perfect square. Her superpower is a clear French cut, minimalist designs, and impeccable aesthetics of each work.

name: Fabrytsii Nataliia
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Master hairdresser-colourist with over 7 years of experience.
She is proficient in all colouring techniques, including Airtouch, Shatush, Highlights, Balayage. Specialises in working with brunettes, choosing harmonious shades, as well as hair restoration. Creates natural, elegant images, focusing on the individual characteristics of the client. Performs only women's haircuts, does not work with short hairstyles and bobs.

Performs only women's haircuts, does not work with short hairstyles and bobs.

name: Jones Edwin
comments: ﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿An expert with 15 years of experience. He is a master of colouring (Airtouch, balayage, colour correction) and haircuts of any complexity - from classic to textured solutions. He studied at Sassoon. Professional in beard modelling, creating curls (permanent) and elegant styling for special events. He is noted for his attention to detail and ability to emphasise natural beauty. Does not perform extensions.
commentsPlainText: An expert with 15 years of experience. He is a master of colouring (Airtouch, balayage, colour correction) and haircuts of any complexity - from classic to textured solutions. He studied at Sassoon. Professional in beard modelling, creating curls (permanent) and elegant styling for special events. He is noted for his attention to detail and ability to emphasise natural beauty. Does not perform extensions.

name: Khamula Ruslana
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Master of manicure, pedicure, and podiatry with over 8 years of experience.
She specialises in classic, combined, and European manicure, gel polish and gel coating, nail strengthening, men's and children's manicure. She performs IBX treatment and SPA care. She has 6 years of experience in pedicure and 4 years in podiatry. She performs hardware, combined, and podiatry pedicures, treatment of onychomycosis, removal of calluses, corns, warts, nail prosthetics, installation of a correction system (titanium thread), and manufacture of individual orthoses. He works with foot fissures and local unloading.

He works with foot fissures and local unloading.

name: Kurylov Arthur
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Highly qualified hairdresser with over 20 years of experience.
He is proficient in all techniques of colouring, haircuts, chemical and bio perms, and evening hairstyles. He is a champion of Ukraine in hairdressing and has worked with famous artists, fashion brands and at Fashion Weeks. He has experience in managing teams of stylists and has introduced innovations in hairdressing. He is noted for his attention to detail and modern approach to work.
He does not perform extensions.

name: Kuzyk Tetiana
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Manicure and pedicure master with over 2 years of experience.
Performs combined manicure and pedicure, creates simple designs. Specialises in working with the shape of nails, creating a perfect square. She works carefully and attentively, helping clients to get a well-groomed and stylish manicure.

name: Ohrynchuk Maryana
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Manicure and pedicure master with over 8 years of experience.
She performs classic and combined manicure, gel polish with levelling, nail extensions (2.5-3 hours), classic French and professional pedicure. She works with high quality, uses modern safe materials, and has an individual approach to each client.

name: Senko Nataly
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Expert colourist with over 25 years of experience.
She is proficient in all modern colouring techniques, works with grey and blonde hair, selects salon treatments and care. Wedding stylist, expert in evening hairstyles and hair extensions. Leading technologist and teacher at Kaaral Academy (Italy), author of training programmes for hairdressers. Gold medallist of the Kyiv Cup, author of collections and techniques for leading publications. Worked as a stylist for Givenchy Beauty shoots.

name: Shchutska Polina
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Hairdresser-colourist with over 5 years of experience.
She specialises in complex colouring techniques, including the safe removal of black colour. She is proficient in highlights, balayage, shatush, airtouch techniques, providing a natural effect and preserving hair quality. She focuses on an individual approach, choosing the best solutions for each client. Performs only women's haircuts, does not work with short hairstyles and bobs.

name: Sova Mariana
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Make-up artist, permanent make-up artist with over 8 years of experience.
Specialises in designing, colouring and laminating eyebrows and eyelashes, performs all types of make-up, permanent eyebrow and lip make-up. Achievements: silver award at PMU London First Champion. Works accurately, with attention to detail, creates a harmonious image that emphasises the individuality of each client.

name: Zelenskaya Alexandra
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Master colourist with over 7 years of experience.
Specialises in creating the perfect blonde and creative colouring, emphasising the individuality of clients. She is proficient in complex techniques such as Airtouch, Balayage, Shatush, Highlights, as well as modern methods of hair restoration. She worked as a stylist at London Fashion Week. Combines innovation, technique and passion for beauty, making each transformation unique.

name: Zhupanska Valeriia
comments:
﻿﻿﻿﻿﻿Make-up, eyebrow and eyelash artist with over 7 years of experience.
Performs all types of make-up, specialises in lamination, correction and colouring of eyebrows and eyelashes. She easily finds a common language with clients and accurately implements their wishes. She advises on the choice of cosmetics and skin care. She was trained by leading teachers who worked on television.
